MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kate Grady, Daughter of defendant and moving party Russell Henrickson was present in the courtroom
Linda N. Reyes, Esq., 510/786-9323, for plaintiff and opposing party
No other appearance on this matter. The Court overruled DEFENDANT RUSSELL HENDRICKSON's DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT, 5 days from notice of entry of order to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JJM/301/DR) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
